# brevo_sender (Data Source)

Look up a sender in Brevo by email.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) From Email of the sender.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the sender.
- `name` (String) From Name of the sender.
